error_signature: Error Trigger only fires for published workflows
title: Error Trigger not firing for manual executions
symptom: The Error Trigger node in workflow B does not activate when workflow A encounters an error during manual execution.
applies_when: Using Error Trigger node in workflow B
Workflow A is published and linked to Error Trigger
not_this_if: Error Trigger is not properly configured
root_cause: The Error Trigger node is designed to only respond to errors from automatically executed workflows. Manual executions do not trigger the Error Trigger, which can lead to confusion when testing workflows.
fix_steps: Verify that the Error Trigger node in workflow B is correctly set up
Use the production URL of the published workflow when testing
agent_instruction: Check the configuration of the Error Trigger node and ensure workflow A is published and executed automatically.
